message.content:
@startuml
title End Screen Action Sequences

actor User
participant Views
participant User Interface Control
participant Back End

participant Game
participant End
participant HighScore
participant Start

participant Navigation
participant Settings
participant JoggleCube
participant HighScores
participant Score
participant Cube
participant Block

section High Score button clicked
    btnHighScoreClicked()
    show(ScreenType.HighScore)
    Navigation -> User Interface Control: prepView()
    User Interface Control -> User Interface Control: getOverallHighScores()
    User Interface Control -> Back End: getScores()
    Back End -> Back End: scores
    User Interface Control -> User Interface Control: scores
    User Interface Control -> Navigation: hideOverlay(ScreenType.End)
end section

section Menu Clicked
    btnMenuClicked()
    show(ScreenType.Start)
    User Interface Control -> User Interface Control: prepView()
    User Interface Control -> Back End: getCurrLang()
    Back End -> Back End: English
    User Interface Control -> User Interface Control: hideOverlay(ScreenType.End)
end section

section Replay clicked
    replayGrid()
    show(ScreenType.GAME)
    User Interface Control -> User Interface Control: prepView()
    User Interface Control -> Back End: getCubeData()
    Back End -> Back End: getCube()
    Back End -> Back End: cube[3][3][3]
    User Interface Control -> User Interface Control: cube[3][3][3]
    User Interface Control -> Navigation: hideOverlay(ScreenType.End)
end section

section Save Clicked
    btnSaveClicked()
    savGrid(filename)
    User Interface Control -> Back End: saveCube(outfile)
    Back End -> Back End: loop [foreach Block]
        Back End -> Back End: getLetter()
        Back End -> Back End: saveCube(outfile)
    Back End -> User Interface Control: saveScore(outfile)
    User Interface Control -> User Interface Control: loop [foreach score]
        User Interface Control -> User Interface Control: save(outfile)
    User Interface Control -> User Interface Control: saveScore(outfile)
end section

@enduml
